summary: I wrote 13 atomic business requirements (R1–R13) for dark mode support to the declared output artifact at `.pipeliner/phases/01-define/main/requirements-writer/output/requirements.md`. Since the input.json contained no discovery notes or resolved inputs, I derived the requirements directly from the ask, expressing each in plain "When X happens, Y should happen" language grouped into five areas: default behavior (defaulting to the device's system setting, with a light-theme fallback), switching via a visible toggle (immediate, bidirectional, with the toggle reflecting current state), remembering and prioritizing the user's manual choice across visits, correctly reacting to later system-setting changes only when no manual choice has been made, and consistency/readability so both themes render fully and color-encoded meaning is preserved.
